name: Orlandi Valuta
description_short: Western Union agent network offering money transfer, check cashing, bill payment, and cash pickup services across multiple US locations with multilingual support.
description_long:
Orlandi Valuta operates as a Western Union agent network, providing access to money transfer and financial services through partner locations across the United States. The company functions as a distributor of Western Union services rather than operating proprietary financial products, leveraging Western Union's established infrastructure for money movement and cash services.

The platform offers a comprehensive suite of services including money sending and receiving, check cashing, bill payment, money orders, wire transfers, mobile top-up, and inmate payment services. Customers can track transfers in real-time, access Western Union Rewards programs, and utilize prepaid card services. The network includes traditional check-cashing establishments, gift shops, grocery stores, and specialty retailers as agent locations, primarily concentrated in Colorado and New Mexico based on available location data.

Orlandi Valuta distinguishes itself through multilingual support, offering services in English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese to serve diverse immigrant and underbanked communities. The agent-based model provides physical locations for walk-in transactions, which is particularly valuable for populations with limited banking access. The integration with Western Union's global network enables international money transfers alongside domestic services.

The company operates in the alternative finance space serving unbanked and underbanked populations who rely on check cashing and money transfer services rather than traditional banking. However, the limited visibility into fee structures, exact service terms, and the reliance on third-party agent locations create information gaps. The service offerings are solid for their target market, but this remains a basic financial services utility rather than an innovative fintech solution.
address: 3010 S Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73109

company_info.headquarters: 3010 S Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73109

pros: Multilingual interface in 6 languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese for diverse populations
Wide range of services including money transfers, check cashing, bill payment, inmate payments, and mobile top-up all in one platform
Real-time transfer tracking and online money transfer estimation tools
Western Union Rewards program for repeat customers with potential benefits
Multiple agent locations across Colorado and New Mexico for physical walk-in access
Prepaid card services and ability to receive money directly on cards
Mobile-friendly platform allowing online money sending and profile management
cons: No transparent fee information available on the website for check cashing or money transfer services
Limited location density based on visible data (only 7 locations shown, mostly concentrated in Colorado/New Mexico region)
Reliance on third-party retail agent partners rather than company-owned locations means service quality and hours vary
No information about check cashing speed, daily limits, or requirements (ID verification, etc.)
Website provides minimal company information about Orlandi Valuta itself—primarily a Western Union location finder
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked immigrants needing multilingual money transfer and check cashing services
Spanish-speaking populations in the Southwest requiring check cashing and bill payment options
Individuals sending money internationally or to family members without bank accounts
diagnosis: Orlandi Valuta is best for unbanked and underbanked immigrants and Spanish-speaking communities in the Southwest who need check cashing, bill payment, and international money transfer services in their preferred languages. The main caveat is the lack of transparent fee information, limited location density, and dependence on variable third-party agent locations for service consistency.
